facebook.caption:
Tourists walk straight past this spa on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Locals don't.

LUA SPA holds a 4.8-star rating across nearly 2,000 reviews and still flies under the radar. Book a session after a long beach day. Your body will notice the difference.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
